videos.title: Emosi punca pelabur rugi?
videos.summary: Mastering your emotions is the ultimate secret to building wealth, and this episode breaks down why psychological discipline—not just market knowledge—determines your investing success. Specifically tailored for Malaysians and young professionals, it delivers actionable strategies to conquer FOMO and fear so you can grow your savings securely. Watch this to transform your relationship with money and avoid the costly emotional traps that drain most beginner portfolios!

videos.title: Why You're Not a Senior Engineer Yet
videos.summary: This video breaks down the psychological and technical roadblocks that keep junior engineers stuck in their roles. It provides actionable advice on how to shift your mindset from merely writing code to owning entire features and driving real business impact, making it essential for anyone looking to level up their career.

videos.title: The Hidden Costs of Islamic Financing
videos.summary: An eye-opening discussion on the structural realities of modern Islamic finance in Malaysia. By understanding the nuances between theoretical Shariah compliance and actual market implementation, you'll be better equipped to make informed, ethical financial decisions in your 20s.

videos.title: How I Built a Second Brain
videos.summary: Ali breaks down the practical steps to organizing your digital life and preventing information overload. As an engineer, implementing this system will drastically reduce cognitive load, allowing you to focus on complex problem-solving rather than remembering where you saved that one code snippet.

videos.title: A Beginner's Guide to Focus (Discovery)
videos.summary: This unexpected gem strips away the typical productivity hacks and focuses on raw, deep work principles. It's a fantastic reminder that true self-improvement often comes from doing less, but doing it with absolute intent—perfect for cutting through the noise of the algorithm.
